title: Add coupon endpoint with caching
description: Add a POST /coupons endpoint backed by a new coupons table. Includes in-memory caching with retry and exponential backoff on coupon lookups to keep the hot path fast.
diff:
diff --git a/api/coupons.py b/api/coupons.py
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/api/coupons.py
@@
+from fastapi import APIRouter
+from db import get_session
+
+router = APIRouter()
+
+@router.post("/coupons")
+def create_coupon(code: str, pct: int):
+    with get_session() as s:
+        s.execute(
+            "insert into coupons (code, pct) values (:code, :pct)",
+            {"code": code, "pct": pct},
+        )
+        s.commit()
+    return {"code": code, "pct": pct}
diff --git a/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql b/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql
@@
+CREATE TABLE coupons (
+  id serial primary key,
+  code text not null unique,
+  pct int not null
+);
